{{ $current := . }} {{ $root := .Site.Home }} {{ $ex := .Site.GetPage "/examples" }} {{ $ref := .Site.GetPage "/reference" }} {{ $isRef := and $ref (eq $current.Section "reference") }} {{ $isExamples := and $ex (eq $current.Section "examples") }} {{/* Home + top-level regular pages + sections, ordered by weight. The home page itself is excluded from the list (the sidebar brand links to it). */}} {{ $allItems := (slice $root | append $root.RegularPages | append $root.Sections).ByWeight }}
{{ if $isRef }} {{/* ── Reference tab: landing, then one page per type grouped by apigroups ── */}} {{ with $ref }}
{{ .Title }}
{{ end }} {{ range site.Data.apigroups.groups }}
{{ .title }}
{{ range .kinds }} {{ $k := . }} {{ range $plural, $dir := $.Site.Data.apis.crds }} {{ $crd := $dir.definition }} {{ if and $crd (eq $crd.spec.names.kind $k) }} {{ with site.GetPage (printf "/reference/%s" $plural) }} {{ $k }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ end }} {{ else if $isExamples }} {{/* ── Examples tab: the examples section and its recipes ── */}} {{ with $ex }}
{{ .Params.navLabel | default .Title }}
{{ with .Params.navLanding }} {{ . }} {{ end }} {{ range .Pages.ByWeight }} {{ if not .Params.tocHidden }} {{ .Title }} {{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ end }} {{ else }} {{/* ── Documentation tab: every non-reference, non-examples section and page ── */}} {{ range $allItems }} {{ if and (ne . $root) (ne . $ref) (ne . $ex) (not .Params.tocHidden) }} {{ if .IsSection }} {{ $section := . }}
{{/* Non-clickable text label; content lives in the sub-pages below. */}}
{{ .Params.navLabel | default .Title }}
{{/* Sections with real landing content expose it as a first child. */}} {{ with .Params.navLanding }} {{ . }} {{ end }} {{ range $section.Pages.ByWeight }} {{ if not .Params.tocHidden }} {{ .Title }} {{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ else }} {{/* Standalone top-level page (e.g. Concepts): render like a section — a label with the page as its single entry — so it matches. */}}
{{ .Params.navLabel | default .Title }}
{{ .Params.linkTitle | default .Title }}
{{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }}
